register.title: Member Registration
register.subtitle: Join the Crystal Kairos community and grow your wealth today.

step_subtitles.3: Provide details of your emergency contact or beneficiary.
step_subtitles.4: Help us understand your goals and how you found us.

bank_details.heading: Bank Details
bank_details.account_name_placeholder: Name will automatically load after account number...
bank_details.account_name_helper: This field is automatically verified from your bank records.
bank_details.info_alert: Ensure the bank details provided belong to you. This account will be used for all your withdrawals and payout transactions.

next_of_kin.heading: Next of Kin Details
next_of_kin.bank_heading: Bank Details of Next of Kin
next_of_kin.full_name_placeholder: Full name of next of kin
next_of_kin.address_placeholder: Residential address of next of kin

interests.heading: Interests & Referral
interests.membership_desc: Select the services you are primarily interested in (You can select multiple).
interests.referrer_name_placeholder: Name of person who referred you
interests.assumptions_intro: Please confirm the following to ensure you meet our membership criteria.
interests.assumption_1: I confirm that all information provided is accurate and I am joining Crystal Kairos of my own volition.
interests.assumption_2: I have access to a smartphone or computer and a stable internet connection to manage my account.
interests.assumption_3: I understand that membership requires integrity and commitment to cooperative principles.
interests.assumption_4: I agree to receive communications regarding my savings and cooperative updates via email or SMS.

review.title: Review & Submit
review.subtitle: Please review your information carefully before submitting your application.

labels.how_heard: How did you hear about us?

review.declaration: I hereby declare that the information provided above is true and accurate to the best of my knowledge. I agree to abide by the Terms & Conditions and Bylaws of Crystal Kairos Cooperative.

success.title: Application Submitted Successfully
success.message: Thank you for registering with Crystal Kairos. Your application is under review. We will contact you once it has been approved.
